Off Calendar Aug-02-2017 Continued To Aug-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jon Vaught for petitioner John C. Yang.

The Court noted that the petition appeared to be in order, but that there was no proposed order for him to review. Mr. Vaught stated that he had a copy of the order with him, and provided it to the Court. The Court granted the petition for probate of will (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
